items.name: Beef Samosa
items.description: Crispy pastry pockets filled with seasoned beef, served with mint and tamarind chutney. A popular appetizer starter showcasing our fusion approach with high customer demand.

items.name: BOGO Peri Peri Dumplings
items.description: Dumplings tossed in a fiery peri-peri spice mix, delivering a bold and tangy kick. Our customer favorite and best-seller that perfectly represents our fusion expertise.

items.name: Tandoori Afghani Dumplings
items.description: Dumplings coated in a rich, nutty afghani-style sauce with aromatic spices. A high demand item showcasing our fusion expertise and creativity.

items.name: Butter Chicken
items.description: Boneless chicken cooked in a creamy tomato sauce with aromatic spices. Our classic Indian favorite features modern presentation and premium quality ingredients.

items.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
items.description: Barbecued chicken cooked in a creamy onion, tomato, and ginger-garlic sauce. Our premium signature dish showcases authentic Indian flavors with exceptional quality.

items.name: Guacamole Phuchka
items.description: Guacamole stuffed in crispy puri, topped with sweet yogurt and tangy sauce. Our unique fusion specialty showcasing the perfect Canadian-Indian blend.
